name: Notion block

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Notion-like Action and Insert Popup Menus

This release introduces native Notion-like block action and insert popup menus to supercharge your writing and block organization in Obsidian Live Preview.

### New Features

* **Block Action & Transform Menu**: Click the drag handle `⠿` button to open a menu.
  * **Convert Block**: Easily transform current blocks into Paragraph, Headings (H1/H2/H3), To-do list, Bulleted/Numbered list, and Quote block.
  * **Style Block**: Apply rich text colors and background highlights using a curated HSL color palette.
  * **Transform to Callout**: Transform any block into standard Obsidian Callouts (Note, Info, Todo, Important, Warning, Help, and more).
* **Block Insert Menu**: Click the add `+` button to open a menu and insert new blocks below:
  * Insert Code block, Math block, Callout box, Table, Internal/External link, Footnote, and Comment.
  * Insert Current Date and Time.
* **Local Image Selection & Attachment Helper**:
  * Integrated native image selector.
  * Automatically cleans up image file names and copies files to the vault's attachment folder.
  * Appends the standard Obsidian embed link `![[image.png]]` to the current line.

### Robustness & Performance Improvements

* **Multi-window & Multi-pane Context Binding**: Bound timers to `ownerWindow` instead of the global window. This prevents timer leakage and context mismatch when drag-and-dropping panels or utilizing Pop-out windows in Obsidian.
* **Lifecycle Cleanup**: Automatically destroys all floating menus and releases resources upon plugin destruction to prevent zombie DOM elements.

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Added missing dependencies (`@codemirror/view`, `@codemirror/state`, `@codemirror/language`, `@lezer/common`) for community compliance.
- Replaced `activeWindow.setTimeout` with native `window.setTimeout` per API guidelines.
- Fixed typescript types for timer return values to support multiple environments.
- Cleaned up unused imports and variables.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚨 Critical Bugfix

### Fixed
- **Plugin completely failed to load** due to `HierarchyRequestError` introduced in v1.2.3
  - **Root cause**: The v1.2.3 compliance refactor replaced `document.createElement('div')` with `activeDocument.createDiv()`. However, `createDiv()` on a Document object not only creates the element but also **appends it to the document root**, which violates HTML's single root element constraint, throwing `HierarchyRequestError`.
  - **Fix**: Changed to `view.scrollDOM.createDiv()` to create the handle directly on the target parent element — both Obsidian API compliant and functionally correct.
- **widget.ts**: Fixed the same pattern — `activeDocument.createSpan()` to `activeDocument.createElement('span')` for detached elements in `WidgetType.toDOM()`.

### Key Takeaway
> Obsidian's `createDiv()/createSpan()/createEl()` are **create + append** compound operations, NOT equivalent to DOM native `createElement()`. Always call them on an HTMLElement parent, never on Document directly.
releases.name: 1.2.4: Critical fix - Plugin loading failure

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## [1.2.3] - 2026-05-13
### Fixed — Obsidian Community Review Compliance
- Remove invalid eslint-disable-next-line comments (4 Errors)
- Replace builtin-modules with node:module builtinModules
- Use activeDocument/activeWindow for popout window compatibility
- Use createDiv()/createSpan() instead of createElement()
- Fix all TypeScript any type safety warnings
- Prefix unused parameters with underscore
- Refactor updateIndicator to use coordsAtPos for type safety
- Add GitHub Actions workflow with artifact attestation
releases.name: Release 1.2.3

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## [1.1.2] - 2026-05-10
### Fixed
- **Block Insertion**: Fixed an issue where selecting a block type from the '+' menu had no effect. The insertion logic is now atomic and more robust.
- **Disappearing Handles**: Fixed a bug where the block handle would disappear after clicking it. Improved hover detection and timeout management.
- **Stability**: Fixed a potential crash by adding the missing hideHandle method.
releases.name: v1.1.2

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
This release introduces the 'Smooth Follow Handles' feature, providing a seamless Notion-like interaction experience.

### New Features
- **Smooth Follow Handles**: Block handles now smoothly follow the mouse vertically in the gutter area, making it easier to interact with non-active lines.
- **Enhanced Gutter Triggering**: Expanded the hover detection area to ensure consistent triggering from the line number area.

### Bug Fixes
- **Handle Offset**: Fixed an issue where handles were vertically offset from the line on pages with properties or headers.
- **Interaction Stability**: Resolved a bug where handles would disappear when attempting to click them.
- **Locking Logic**: Improved vertical stability to prevent handles from jittering when moving the mouse within a single line.
releases.name: v1.1.0: Smooth Follow Handles

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
# Changelog

## [1.0.3] - 2026-05-09

### Improved
- **UI Refinement**: Redesigned block handles (`⠿` and `+`) with a softer color (`#aea9a3`) to minimize visual distraction.
- **Native Menu Integration**: Refactored both transform and insert menus to use standard Obsidian menus for a refined and consistent experience.
- **Semantic Separation**: Distinctly separated the functions of the `⠿` (Transform) and `+` (Insert) menus to align with block-editing logic.

### Fixed
- **Insertion Logic**: Optimized block insertion to prevent unnecessary double newlines.
releases.name: v1.0.3
